summary.title: Online Mobile Shop Management System
summary.description:
System Description
The Online Mobile Shop Management System allows customers to register, browse mobile products, add products to their cart, place orders, and track shipments. Administrators manage inventory, view sales reports, maintain customer records, and update shipment tracking information.
External Entities
•	Customer 
•	Admin 
Processes
•	Customer Registration 
•	Product & Order Management 
•	Order Tracking 
Data Flows
•	Customer Details 
•	Customer Information 
•	Add to Cart 
•	Checkout 
•	Order Details 
•	Tracking Number 
•	Sales Reports 
•	Stock Information
